blurb: After quitting my job at the beginning of 2024, I took a month off between gigs and spent some time in the American West. This was the fourth and final leg of my trip, where I visited my parents who were snowbirding in Arizona. I haven't spent much time in the desert before, but I enjoyed the dry air (especially compared to east coast winters) and sunny weather.
subtitle: Some parts of the American southwest look like another planet and it's kind of insane and awesome
title: Sonoran desert
